result: The R script has been successfully executed. The cleaned and harmonized NS-SEC occupational class variables have been processed and saved to 'data/output/cleaned_data.csv'. The file contains the NSID and the age-specific NS-SEC variables (nssec17, nssec18, nssec19, nssec20, nssec25, nssec32) with harmonized missing value codes and collapsed fractional codes to major categories.
